title: Company Overview Assessment - Set 3
description: Assessment covering JSL company profile, organizational culture, manufacturing facilities, certifications, workplace ethics, safety awareness, and employee responsibilities.

questions.question: What is the main objective of JSL?
questions.explanation: JSL is one of India's leading stainless steel manufacturers.

questions.question: Which department is responsible for ensuring product quality?
questions.explanation: The Quality department ensures products meet required specifications.

questions.question: Which document provides employees with company policies and procedures?
questions.explanation: The Employee Handbook contains company policies and workplace guidelines.

questions.question: Which value encourages employees to act honestly and ethically?
questions.explanation: Integrity promotes honesty, transparency, and ethical behaviour.

questions.question: Why is continuous improvement important?
questions.explanation: Continuous improvement helps improve processes, products, and productivity.

questions.question: Which activity should every employee participate in?
questions.explanation: Safety training prepares employees to work safely.

questions.question: Professional workplace behaviour includes:
questions.explanation: Professional employees follow workplace rules and standards.

questions.question: Which factor improves customer trust?
questions.explanation: Reliable product quality builds customer confidence.

questions.question: What is one purpose of company certifications?
questions.explanation: Certifications demonstrate compliance with recognized quality standards.

questions.question: Employees should report unsafe conditions to:
questions.explanation: Unsafe conditions should be reported immediately.

questions.question: Safety is the responsibility of every employee.
questions.explanation: Every employee contributes to workplace safety.

questions.question: Quality checks are performed only after dispatch.
questions.explanation: Quality inspections are carried out throughout production.

questions.question: Following SOPs reduces operational errors.
questions.explanation: Standard Operating Procedures improve consistency.

questions.question: Employees may ignore PPE if they are experienced.
questions.explanation: PPE is mandatory regardless of experience.

questions.question: Customer satisfaction is important for business success.
questions.explanation: Satisfied customers help maintain long-term business growth.

questions.question: What is the primary business of JSL?
Why are Standard Operating Procedures important?
questions.sampleAnswer: SOPs ensure consistent, safe, and standardized work practices.

questions.question: Name any two employee responsibilities related to safety.
questions.sampleAnswer: Wear PPE and report unsafe conditions.

questions.question: Why is teamwork important in manufacturing?
questions.sampleAnswer: Teamwork improves coordination, productivity, and communication.

questions.question: Name two departments commonly found in manufacturing companies.
questions.sampleAnswer: Examples include Production, HR, Finance, Quality, and IT.

questions.question: Which department generally manages employee training?
questions.explanation: HR organizes employee development and training.

questions.question: Which of the following improves workplace communication?
questions.explanation: Good communication improves organizational performance.

questions.question: Why should employees follow company policies?
questions.explanation: Policies provide a common framework for all employees.

questions.question: Which factor contributes to operational excellence?
questions.explanation: Improvement initiatives increase efficiency and quality.

questions.question: Which statement best represents JSL's workplace philosophy?
options: Safety, Quality, Integrity and Continuous Improvement
questions.correctAnswer: Safety, Quality, Integrity and Continuous Improvement
questions.explanation: These principles represent a strong manufacturing culture.
